storyInfo: Raidian leads a team back into Ursus to find information on the Sarcophagus. The miners of the Far Northern Central Mining District kill a Patrol Unit that attacked them, wanting to leave the district. To remove the positioning chips within the miners' bodies, their leader Rankin asks Raidian for help, who is also in the district at the time.

attributes.content: <p=1>Meeting Room, New Rhodes Island</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Any clues on the Sarcophagus?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The very latest activity we know of involving the Sarcophagus came after the Chernobog-Lungmen incident, when the Ursine government retrieved the entire system.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: As for what they actually plan to do with it, they've been keeping it under tighter wraps than ever. There's nothing more about it in Kal'tsit's records.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: It's not like we can directly ask the Ursine government to borrow it...;Do we have any other way of finding its location?

attributes.content: Looking at the official register made after the Chernobog research institute was destroyed, there were no survivors other than Sergei.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We did manage to find some clues when looking into what happened to him afterwards.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: He had established a new institute to continue researching the Sarcophagus. In the short period of time that the institute was operating, one name really stood out to us—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Artyom Chaadayev.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: He was vice-director at Sergei's institute, but he's a complete ghost, with no verifiable academic or political background to speak of.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We may be able to make a rational deduction...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: That this man had a special connection to Sergei?;That this man had a special connection to the institute?

attributes.content: No matter what his connection may be, he might be the key to our breakthrough.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: So we need to find this Artyom?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: No, things get a little more complicated from here on out...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: He's proven to be very hard to track ever since Sergei's institute shut down.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: According to Kal'tsit's intelligence, he died of heart failure in the Grypherburg Imperial Sanatorium last winter.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: He maintained a good relationship with Ursus to his last.;Maybe we can look into the people who knew him.

attributes.content: Great idea! That's what I was thinking too.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: There's another researcher who had a connection to Artyom.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Ksenia Markovna Nelidova.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We have a lot more detail on her background. Before the Sarcophagus incident, she had briefly served as Ilia's assistant at the Chernobog research institute, and had crossed paths with Kal'tsit.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Recent intelligence indicates she is currently in the Ursine Far North, working at the Central Mining District Laboratory, administered by the city of Bresk.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: That's where Artyom's final letters were sent.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: It doesn't sound like a particularly reliable clue...;But it's the only clue we've got.
We should go to the research institute and find her.

attributes.content: I have to remind you, Doctor.
attributes.name: Warfarin

attributes.content: While we're all determined to bring Kal'tsit back, we must thoroughly evaluate the risks of every mission.
attributes.name: Warfarin

attributes.content: Rhodes Island cannot bear any more losses.
attributes.name: Warfarin

attributes.options: But...

attributes.content: I'll go.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Raidian?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Ursus has always been a dangerous place, and we have very limited intelligence for this mission.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: And there are many important decisions the Doctor and Amiya must make while Rhodes Island is being rebuilt.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Raidian, I can—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I know you're a capable young woman now, Amiya, but that is exactly why you need to stay here and handle our most important tasks.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The latest news from Laterano is also worrying, and the Doctor will need to see to it personally. Allowing Rhodes Island to steady its footing in our new home is our top priority.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You're right...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: If it were just an infiltration mission, then Misery's team would be the best choice, but information gathering is my team's specialty.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Besides, there's no one better to send back to Ursus than me, is there?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You make some real compelling arguments, Raidian...
attributes.name: Closure

attributes.content: But it's your decision, Doctor.
attributes.name: Closure

attributes.options: This will be a very dangerous mission.;Stay safe, Raidian.
Rhodes Island cannot lose anyone else.

attributes.content: We will. We'll act with caution as a mobile medical team.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The rest of you, take care of yourselves while we're out, okay?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Of course...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I hope that all of you come home safe.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: '...I shall meditate and share in his pain.'
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: 'One man's pain is everyone's pain, one man's sin is everyone's sin...'
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: 'May sinners repent with all their heart, may their sins be forgiven, and their souls find salvation...'
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District, Ursus</><p=2>Five days ago</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Wargh—!
attributes.name: Pained Howling

attributes.content: Ahhhhhh—!
attributes.name: Pained Howling

attributes.content: Oh my...
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: It's... okay, ba-babushka. D-Don't... be scared.
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: It's U-Uchitel Rankin... He's chased away the P-Patrol Unit chasing us.
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: We're s-safe for now.
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: Yes... for now.
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: Where else can we go? Where must we go to find shelter...?
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: B-Babushka... are-are you hungry...? I'll go ask Hawley... for another piece of bread.
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: I'm fine... You're such a sweet child, but I really am.
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: Go see Rankin.
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: He has done so much, his spirit must be nearly worn away.
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: Go see him. Do not let him be burdened any more than he already is.
attributes.name: Elderly Woman

attributes.content: Uchitel, he...
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: Phew...
attributes.name: Youthful Miner

attributes.content: Under the twilight sky, the young man's stern countenance eases.
The cold soon cools the warm blood staining his pickaxe. The enemy before him is completely routed.
Don't... Don't kill me! You're not allowed to do anything to me, I surrendered!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: But we haven't accepted that surrender.
attributes.name: Youthful Miner

attributes.content: Tell me, how many of these squads are pursuing us?
attributes.name: Youthful Miner

attributes.content: Chyort! I don't—I don't know!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Every Patrol Unit's independent, we don't talk to each other!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Tell me something I don't know, or I'll have no reason to let you live.
attributes.name: Youthful Miner

attributes.content: Wait, don't! Listen to me!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: The chips you have in you! The diagnostic chips!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Chips? You mean the ones used to check how infected we are?
attributes.name: Youthful Miner

attributes.content: Ha... Hahaha...
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: 'Rankin the Noble', 'Rankin the Hero', are you really so naive?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Those chips send your coordinates to the mine's research facility and nearby guard posts. The moment you try and leave the mining district, or the chip leaves your body—
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Boom!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Losing a single leg would be lucky. Losing both is definitely possible. You won't be running anywhere like that, haha!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Just give up already, Rankin... You think you can leave this mine by killing a Patrol Unit?
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: There's nowhere to go. Ursus will chase you forever.
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Surrender. It's the only way you won't die a miserable death.
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Don't listen to him, Rankin! If the chips really did blow up, we'd have a bunch of three-legged burdenbeasts walking around!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: The Patrol Units are worse than bastards! An honest one of them is like an aphid in winter! I got to know them before I became infected!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Gah—!
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: You've done enough today, Rankin. Leave this one to me!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: N-No!
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: St-Stop—killing people!
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: We don't... need to! N-Nobody's... badly hurt...
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: Uchitel!
attributes.name: Young Miner

attributes.content: Let him go.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Get back, Vetochki! What's the point in showing a man like him mercy?
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: It was these bastards who killed Paulina, all because she was caring for an unregistered child... She was pregnant when they hanged her!
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Have you forgotten all the terrible things they've done?
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Urgh! *cough* *cough*
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Haha, thank you, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: I remember you... You were the meekest of all the children. You will have a happy ending, even if the rest of these scum—
attributes.name: Frightened Patrol Unit

attributes.content: Uchitel!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: ...At least I didn't let him bleed out slowly in the snow.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Stand up, Vetochki. Go to the back and find that doctor for me.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Paul, go get Nikto and tell him to gather everyone who wants to leave the mining district at the south dormitory.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Get them ready, we need these chips out of us.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You believe what that guy said?
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Doesn't matter, we need the chips out of our bodies. Even if they don't explode, they definitely transmit our location.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: The Patrol Units have already found us once, and we don't know when the next squad will show up. If this keeps on, we'll be on the back foot the entire time.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Alright, I'll get it done.
attributes.name: Excited Miner

attributes.content: Uchitel, y-you pro-promised... me...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Oh, you're still here.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I didn't promise you anything, Vetochki.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Besides, if the rest of the bastards in his units are dead, why should he be any exception? Because of his arrogance? Because of his ridicule?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: ...Never mind. You wouldn't understand. Forget what I just said.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Right, take this.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: What... is it?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: A stopwatch. I found it in the institute, should still work. When we get a minute, I'll teach you how to use it.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: From now on, you won't need to live your life counting meaningless numbers, worrying about a miscount leaving people dead in the mines.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: At least now... Go, Vetochki. Go help me find her.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Uchitel, your hand... is shaking...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Hush. Go do what you have to do.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: ...At least... let me...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Pray that your... soul... can be... saved.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Even though you've seen how those men treated us, and seen how I killed them?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Y-Yes.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Do not be so quick to bless others, or to forgive them, Vetochki. Me included.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Now go already. We don't have time.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: ...Gospodin Rankin.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Hello, Gospozha Serafina.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Though we have not known each other for long, I want to believe that, since your medical team was willing to come to such a remote place to treat the Infected, you are people I can trust.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I am sorry that I now have no choice but to ask for your help.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Please, go ahead. As long as it's something I can help with.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I just learned that inside every miner, there is a tracking chip that could explode at any moment. We need a way to extract them so we can escape the Patrol Units.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I am prepared to serve as a test subject myself.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: If it is successful, please perform the surgery on the others. If it does unfortunately explode, then I hope you will be able to give me first aid.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: If I die... then I ask you to tell everyone waiting for me about this.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Now, I must ask you to leave—
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: No. Let me do an examination first. May I?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Go ahead.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: ...I regret to inform you, these chips really could explode.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: They contain miniaturized, high-powered Originium bombs. If the chip does not receive electrical signals from the local district relay or the human body, it will trigger an explosion...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: If you hope to get everyone out of this district, then you must remove the chips.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Amazing. Is this your Arts at work?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Of course...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I may be able to temporarily copy the signal to fool the receiver. But I must warn you, this still carries a great deal of risk.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We can't afford to wait for a perfect solution. Your idea is good enough.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: One moment, then.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Raidian starts using her Arts, causing beams of energy to resonate at the same frequency as the chip's receiver.
Rankin nods and sits down, grasping the hilt of his dagger. It is cold, smooth, and solid as he rubs it against the calluses of his palm.
You'd best back away from me a bit, Doctor.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: That won't be happening. This is the first time I've tried it, so I need to observe it in real-time.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I can guide your hand using nerve impulses. Take care not to detonate the chip.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Incredible... It's a shame we didn't meet sooner.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I hope we will still have the chance to chat after this.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Rankin wipes his dagger with some alcohol, pointing its blade at the scar on his leg before plunging it into his flesh.
Phew...
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: ...It worked, right?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: The youthful miner nearly leaps up, forgetting the cut on his leg oozing blood.
Calm down, your wound needs dressing.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Ah, of course. Thank you, Doctor. I owe you my life.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You are truly amazing. I have never seen a physician as skilled as you. You even remind me of an Ursine soldier.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: What do you mean by that?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Sorry, please do not misunderstand me. This is the highest praise I can think of.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I mean true Ursine soldiers, not those Patrol Unit brutes. The ones who drove off the invading Nightzmora and freed us from the tyrannical Hippogryphs. They were true heroes.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Oh, yes, have you read Igor Velikiy's biography?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We should prepare for surgery on the others. How many will we need to operate on?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I'm afraid it's a number that will leave you and your colleagues running ragged.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: My decoy electrical signal can cover the entirety of this area, and my colleagues can coordinate the surgeries. That being the case, I reckon we will need to stay here for some time.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Time is something we are short on.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Have the medical team prioritize the elderly and children, then teach the others to perform the surgery. Hand out some scalpels. My people are not squeamish.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I would appreciate it if you did not make medical decisions for me.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Ah, no, Doctor, I did not mean to order you around.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Since the duty of leading everyone out of this mining district is mine, I need to make decisions accordingly.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Patrol Units who can show up at any time, extreme weather, lack of supplies... All things that will prove fatal.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I hope we can reach an agreement on this.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: No matter what happens, we need to be wary of infection. My team will oversee the sterilization procedures.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Then let's begin.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: 'Act first, then discuss the future.'
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Blurghhh—!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: *cough* *cough*! Blergh... *cough*!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Is this your limit?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: When you were eating smoked sausages back in Grypherburg, did you never wonder how they were made? Never went to see the slaughterhouses in the satellite cities?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Idi nahui! Rot in hell, Rankin! Suka blyat'!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: I swallowed a bunch of snow but I still can't get the smell of blood out of my nose. Next time I have the chance, I'm dumping fresh burdenbeast blood into your soup!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Fresh burdenbeast blood is expensive. A bucket can cost more than a hundred chervontsy, we can't afford that...
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: It was a metaphor, dammit... I didn't know you used to be a gourmet chef, Hawley.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: My son transported that sort of thing when he was a truck driver. The Grypherburg nobles believed the blood of young burdenbeasts would make them beautiful.
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: He told me a lot of things about the city in his letters, but the last one I received was seven years ago. I hope he's still alright...
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: Then I'll have to ask you to make sure Nikto doesn't mess with my dinner.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I'll make sure. Nobody is messing with anyone's dinner.
attributes.name: Hawley

attributes.content: I hope this won't end up being our last meal, or I'll be cursing you to the grave, Rankin.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Whatever you say. I'm in good spirits today.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: It's been so long since I've felt this sort of freedom.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We have finally broken our shackles. We are free now. What we want to do, where we want to go, and how we want to live our lives, we can decide for ourselves now.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You should save the poetry recital for when we're actually safe...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: So, what now?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: The plan hasn't changed.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: We head south to the border with Kazimierz, find the village founded by the Infected, the one that belongs only to the Infected. There will be space for all of us there.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You're just blindly believing in this 'Reunion' without even knowing if they're the real deal...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: No, I have my reasons to believe.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: A few years back when I was stationed at the border, I heard a lot about them, information I could trust.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: They provide shelter for the Infected, give out medicine for free, and have fended off many Patrol Units who wanted to push around people like us. I believe we will find people who share our ideals there.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: That just makes me think it's some Infected delusion, or the army spinning up an excuse for a bigger share of taxes.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: It makes me wonder why it took until now for a banner like this to be flown.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: If... If we find out they do not exist, then it should be us who raise the flag.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Hah... And here I thought your time on the border would have taught you better.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Just imagine for a moment, if you had saved that count back then instead of that Infected, you could be a lieutenant right now, maybe even a captain.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Patrol Units like the one we ran into today would be licking your boots with a wave of your finger.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Then I should be even more grateful for the choice I made that day. Otherwise, I would not have had the chance to see this nation's true face, or learn what my life's greatest calling is.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Our people have been duped and deceived for far too long! They believe their current lives are what they deserve, forgetting what they should really have!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: This is not only a conflict between the Infected and ordinary folk. If one day, all the Infected in Ursus died, they would use some other standard to decide who to cast into the mines.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Why do some have everything handed to them, while others must struggle for survival? Who do the fruits of their bitter toil go to?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: But who actually gets to say what people deserve?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Maybe the way this land is is the way things should be. Even if there were another Terra, even if civilization started over from scratch, things might not turn out any different from now.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: No... I don't believe that.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: When you opened your eyes and actually looked at everything around us, did you not feel anger? When we feel such an instinctual rage, that means everything is wrong!
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You should know that, based on what you've been through, Nikto.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Don't bring up that crap, it's ancient history...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Fine... Even if it is as you say, how far are we from the border? What other things will we run into on the way there?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: I have a plan. Why do you think I asked you to gather up those chips?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: They didn't blow up when we took them out of us like other chips, which means they still work as positioning devices.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: These things have brought us so much suffering. Why not use them to our advantage against the Patrol Units?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: That's not what we agreed on when we decided to escape!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: You know our condition, Rankin. How many of us can even move right now? Maybe half?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: We might be able to beat one or two Patrol Units, but we can't hold off all of Ursus! The only thing causing more bloodshed would do is to trap us here even further!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: If we want to live, taking this step is only a matter of time.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Every Patrol Unit lackey we kill is another spare ventilator in our hands.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Any supplies we seize can be used to leave the icefields, and allow children like Vetochki to live to see another day.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Have you forgotten what gave us the opportunity to leave this place?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Even if that thing can't be called human, we were the ones who killed it.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I don't know what you're talking about.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: You've become completely unreasonable, before we've even left the mining district!
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: I don't want to fight over this, Nikto—
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Uchitel?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: And... Nikto, you're... here too...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: N-Nothing. I just came to see if... you had eaten yet...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Oh, you don't need to ask this guy. His stomach's already full of his grand ideals.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Haha... You're not really wrong.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: You should focus on our physician friends, it was they who did all the hard work today.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I just went to... see them. They're... about to... rest.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Good. You've worked hard too.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: How's the wound, does it hurt?
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: I... I'm okay. Everyone's... okay.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Really now? Everyone's been very brave.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Go rest. Eat your fill, then sleep tight.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Eh... We... don't have much food... My portion's... not very big...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Take care of yourself... too... Uchitel...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Vetochki really trusts you, Rankin, always calling you 'Uchitel', like you're her teacher.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Everyone trusts you. They're waiting for you to get them out of here.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: I know, which is why every word I tell her is what I know to be true in my heart.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: It is the same as when I lead everyone. I take the path I believe to be right.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Let's hope you are.
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: Relax a little, Nikto. Today is the day of our first victory. It's a good omen. No need to look so anxious.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: When someone awakens to the truth and decides to set off on a journey, it is the grandest of beginnings.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Quoting from Igor's biography again?
attributes.name: Nikto

attributes.content: No, those are my own words.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: Trust me, Nikto. We are doing great things right now.
attributes.name: Rankin

attributes.content: All the surgeries are complete, Captain.
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: Some of the patients are developing fevers, and we're limited in what we can do...
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: Got it. I'll go have a word with their leader after this, and do my best to ensure the wounded are provided with food and water.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You've worked hard today. Get some rest. Taking care of yourselves is important too.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Captain, we still need to—
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: The Far North is under martial law, and the weather is affecting our ability to communicate too. It's difficult for us to connect to the outside.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: What happened here will surely draw the attention of the Ursine authorities. We need to leave ASAP. We can't stay here.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: But do we really need to work with them?
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: I'm worried that if we do, we'll be drawn into a conflict with Ursus...
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic Operator

attributes.content: Rhodes Island has no reason to make an enemy of the Empire, but right here, right now, these are just people struggling to survive.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Changing the lives of the Infected has always been our mission.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Besides, they have also helped us out a lot.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Don't worry for now, just do your best to prepare for the unexpected. I'll keep trying to get in contact with our base in the city.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: If they can receive the information we sent earlier... I hope they will notice the clues we left behind when they come to help us.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: <p=1>Bresk, Far North, Ursus</><p=2>Three days ago</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Bresk Times, get your copy here—
attributes.name: Passing Newsboy

attributes.content: Do you want one, devushka?
attributes.name: Passing Newsboy

attributes.content: Oh, s-sure. How much?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Twenty para, is that okay?
attributes.name: Passing Newsboy

attributes.content: That's fine.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: But I don't have any spare change on me... Here, take this.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Thank you, devushka! You're amazing!
attributes.name: Passing Newsboy

attributes.content: Amiya carefully places an entire chervonets in the boy's palm. He quickly disappears around the street corner, as if frightened his benefactor might regret her decision and take it back.

attributes.options: Amiya?;What're you looking at?

attributes.content: That boy's clothes looked... very thin.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Bresk is colder than the Ursus I remember.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: It was winter the last time we were in Ursus.;Bresk is further north than Chernobog.

attributes.content: I still remember...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: It was the first time I saw such intense fighting. I was so nervous I forgot to be scared.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: At the time, I thought I would never see anything so dangerous again.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: We've been through a lot since then.
At least now there's no Catastrophes or people chasing us.;At least now I know who I actually am.

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: On that topic, Doctor, it's rather rare for us to have the chance to quietly watch a city like this, isn't it?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Chernobog, Lungmen, Londinium... Wherever we go, our memories seem to be filled with chaos and the fires of war.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: It's how this land should be.;We should remember what this city is like now.
Let's check today's paper.;Does it say why the mines have been blocked off?

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We might only be able to learn more once Eloysius has finished negotiating with the Grand Duchess.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: She said she would help us apply for a permit to enter the mining district, but how will she actually go about doing that?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: She made sure we knew how limited our info is.;She wants us on the back foot.

attributes.content: The Grand Duchess's office is right ahead.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: From the intelligence we gathered beforehand, her name is Elisaveta Konstantinovna Lacitsara.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: She's not the typical Ursine noble. Her policies are known for being kind, to Infected and non-Infected alike.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Every channel of information we've checked describes her as a good person.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: A woman like that deserves more than just 'kindness'.;The Grand Duchess must also be a bright woman.
Her office is rather humble-looking.;Almost looks like a regular home.

attributes.content: The buildings in Bresk are relatively short and regular. It must be the style here in the Far North.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: But looking at the map, all the surrounding buildings seem to almost envelop it. A rather unique location, in terms of urban planning.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: So, here we are again.;They're not even letting us wait inside this time.
A no-nonsense young lady.;A local leader with quite the reputation.

attributes.content: Are you worried, Doctor?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Honestly speaking, so am I. Even if Eloysius has made her thoughts on the matter clear, we still do not know her true goal—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: (Shakes head);Doesn't this all feel rather familiar?

attributes.content: Oh... You mean like in Lungmen?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Ch'en really is no-nonsense, isn't she?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: Don't you mean 'hard to work with'?

attributes.content: Let's go with 'strict'.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Ch'en treats others the same way she treats herself. That's how it was back then, that's how it is now.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Oh, right! We got news from her before we left home. While she didn't go into detail on her movements, she sounded well.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: When she heard about what happened, she promised that if Rhodes Island needed her, she would return.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: We've made a lot of friends.;But a lot have left us too.

attributes.content: I still remember when we were working with Ch'en, the one who actually represented Rhodes Island and negotiated with Chief Wei was Dr. Kal'tsit.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Doctor, I'm worried that I won't be able to solve problems or get people to work with us like she did.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Also, we know practically nothing about Ursus's current circumstances, or the Grand Duchess.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Doctor, I...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: We don't need to do what only Kal'tsit could do.
Be yourself, Amiya.;We'll find a way.

attributes.content: May I ask which of you is Dr. {@nickname} of Rhodes Island?
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Her Imperial Highness the Grand Duchess invites you to meet with her.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier
